scripts.dev:docker: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio temporal temporal-ui && pnpm db:migrate && docker compose --profile app --profile worker --profile hocuspocus up -d --build
scripts.dev:docker:down: docker compose --profile app --profile worker --profile hocuspocus --profile ollama down
scripts.dev:docker:logs: docker compose --profile app --profile worker --profile hocuspocus logs -f
scripts.dev:docker:rebuild: docker compose --profile app --profile worker --profile hocuspocus build --no-cache
scripts.dev:docker:reset: docker compose --profile app --profile worker --profile hocuspocus --profile ollama down -v
